description: Slice S4 (FGAP-029): schema re-sync via the existing migration registry (forward-migrate, NOT blind copy) + cleaning propagation. Refresh installed schemas through migrations.json / validateBlockWithMigration; identity-migration for shape-compatible / description-only bumps. Running it on this repo propagates the genericized catalog descriptions into .context/schemas/ (FGAP-028 residual) with ZERO data loss and resolves the layer-plans 1.0.0->1.0.1 skew. Closes FGAP-029 (data-loss closed at S1; safe schema re-sync closed here). Per DEC-0010: CHANGELOG + usage-only docs.
acceptance_criteria: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
notes: Slice S4/4 of DEC-0010 | depends on S2 | closes FGAP-029 + addresses FGAP-028 residual
